step_rationale: Fibrinogen anchor; structural component of fibrin clot; platelet aggregation ligand; thrombus formation.
mechanism: Fibrinogen polymerizes into fibrin scaffolding the occlusive coronary thrombus and amplifies platelet aggregation.
